title: Daily Murugan Wisdom 25: Learning Without Ego
dailyFocus: Knowledge becomes wisdom only when pride is removed.
reflection: Lord Murugan's Vel reminds the devotee that clarity must cut through hesitation before action becomes powerful.
Today, practise learning without ego not as a theory, but as one visible behaviour in your home, work, or study.
Keep the action small enough to complete, but sincere enough to change your state of mind.
practice: Pause for one minute before starting the main task of the day.
Chant 'Om Saravana Bhava' 12 times with attention.
Complete one duty without complaint or delay.
avoid: Do not confuse emotional excitement with spiritual discipline.
